response.global_analysis: Dialogue and performance segment. Transcribed dialogue in English and Japanese. Song lyrics transcribed from on-screen text and synced to the audio waveform. Character limits and splitting rules applied to ensure readability and sync.

subtitles.original: We were able to release our very, very first original song, "FUWAMOCO Abura Age!"
subtitles.english: We were able to release our very, very first original song, "FUWAMOCO Abura Age!"

subtitles.original: Going to Bau-Bau!
And then for our second anniversary, we were able to release "Lifetime Showtime!"
subtitles.english: And then for our second anniversary, we were able to release "Lifetime Showtime!"

subtitles.original: Our original song that's been with us along this journey...
subtitles.english: Our original song that's been with us along this journey...

subtitles.original: ...a very special song.
And you know, for FUWAMOCO, singing and dancing is something that means so much to us!
subtitles.english: And you know, for FUWAMOCO, singing and dancing is something that means so much to us!

subtitles.original: Yeah, music!
And Ruffians, you might have heard that you'd like to hear more from us too, right?
subtitles.english: And Ruffians, you might have heard that you'd like to hear more from us too, right?

subtitles.original: Yeah, yeah!
What do you think? Yeah?
Well...
...our announcement is...
Drumroll!
Okay, drumroll! Yeah!
Pupupupupupupupupupupupu...
DUN!
A NEW ORIGINAL SONG!
新、新、新オリジナル曲！
subtitles.english: A new, new, new original song!

subtitles.original: And this song is extra special!
subtitles.english: And this song is extra special!

subtitles.original: It's written by none other than the legendary...
subtitles.english: It's written by none other than the legendary...

subtitles.original: ...rock idol song composer, Matsukuma Kenta-san!
Who works with many famous idol groups we love!
subtitles.english: Who works with many famous idol groups we love!

subtitles.original: He's also written music for the idol group...
subtitles.english: He's also written music for the idol group...

subtitles.original: ...that Kuro-chan produces, 豆柴の大群さん！
But Ruffians, you might be a little bit surprised, okay?
subtitles.english: But Ruffians, you might be a little bit surprised, okay?

subtitles.original: So get ready!
Ruffians, with this song, we'd like to express our Ruffian feelings as Demon Dogs!
subtitles.english: Ruffians, with this song, we'd like to express our Ruffian feelings as Demon Dogs!

「相棒、どこへ行こうか」
ネオンの脇を抜け
バブルガムがはじけたら let's go
subtitles.english: When the bubblegum pops, let's go

僕らは群れをなす
「あの頃よりもマシだね」 my way
subtitles.english: "It's better than back then," my way.

subtitles.english: How are you feeling? Are you crying?

subtitles.english: I want to tear off the chains and scream.
